narratives.Overview: Wrap the @marky/core pipeline in an LSP server so editors can show inline lint diagnostics without a separate plugin. New @marky/lsp package using vscode-languageserver. Ships with a VS Code extension as a thin wrapper. Depends on auto-fix scope for the codeAction/fix capability.

items.title: New `packages/lsp` workspace package (@marky/lsp) with vscode-languageserver dependency
LSP server: onDidOpen and onDidSave trigger lintString; publishes textDocument/publishDiagnostics
Debounced onDidChange handler (300ms) for as-you-type feedback
Config reload: watches marky.config.ts for changes and re-runs lint without server restart
codeAction provider: surfaces auto-fixable violations as quick-fix actions (depends on auto-fix scope)
New `packages/vscode` workspace package: VS Code extension that spawns @marky/lsp as a child process
`marky lsp` CLI command starts the LSP server over stdio for editor integration (Neovim, Zed, etc.)
Tests: LSP server emits correct diagnostics for known violations; clean file emits empty diagnostics array
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for @marky/lsp
